Screenshot here
⚠️
Security Matters

Malicious VS Code extensions are real. We're different—every line of code is public and auditable.

✅
Full Source Available

100% open source. Review every line at GitHub.

🤝
Community Driven

We welcome fixes, features, and security reviews. Contribute.

Features

🎨

Syntax Highlighting

100+ languages supported via Shiki. Your code looks as good on paper as it does on screen.

📄

Professional PDFs

Vector PDF generation for high fidelity printing. Crisp text at any zoom level, perfect for printing or archiving.

👁️

Interactive Preview

We create a PDF for you to print (or save) with a fully interactive preview right in VS Code. See exactly what you'll get before printing.

🔧

Customizable

Multiple themes, font sizes, paper sizes, and margin options. Make it yours.

📝

Markdown Support

Print markdown as raw syntax or rendered HTML. Perfect for documentation.

💻

Cross-Platform

Works on Mac, Windows, and Linux. Wherever VS Code runs, {{product_name}} works.

Quick Start

1

Install the Extension

Search for "{{product_name}}" in VS Code Extensions (Ctrl+Shift+X) or install directly.

2

Open Any Code File

Works with any language VS Code supports. TypeScript, Python, Rust, Go—you name it.

3

Press Alt+P

Preview opens instantly. Adjust settings, then print or save as PDF. That's it.

Latest Update

{{release_month}}

Welcome to {{product_name}}

We built this extension because sometimes you need code on paper. Whether you're reviewing algorithms away from screens, preparing for a whiteboard session, or just prefer reading on paper—we've got you covered.
